text.title: Value Stream Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have ≥30 completed items in 90 days with step timestamps?

conclusion.verdict: Instrument steps and accumulate sample first
Compute Process Time / Lead Time per step

branch.when: sample_sufficient == true AND flow_efficiency_known == true AND bottleneck_picked == false

conclusion.verdict: Pick the single biggest wait step

branch.when: sample_sufficient == true AND flow_efficiency_known == true AND bottleneck_picked == true

conclusion.verdict: Draft report with p50/p85/p95 + bottleneck investment plan
